description_long: This is a low-top casual sneaker featuring a cream-colored upper with brown accents along the heel, eyelets, and side panels. The shoe has a rounded toe and a thick, textured rubber sole in a mustard yellow color, providing both style and durability. The lacing system uses standard criss-cross laces in a light beige shade, threading through six pairs of eyelets. The interior lining appears to be a soft, tan material, likely suede or fabric, for added comfort. The overall design is clean and modern, suitable for everyday urban wear. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A cream and brown low-top sneaker with a mustard yellow sole and standard criss-cross laces, designed for casual urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cream upper, brown accents, and thick yellow sole with visible stitching and lacing details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, symmetrical lacing, and the width of the yellow sole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same color scheme and design symmetry as the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the brown heel panel, tan interior lining, and the back profile of the yellow sole.
